plan.description: Deep reasoning & architecture planning. Use for complex design decisions, sprint planning, architecture reviews.

build.description: General coding and implementation. Default agent for writing code, fixing bugs, refactoring.

explore.description: Codebase exploration and research. Use for understanding code, finding patterns, impact analysis.

backend.description: Backend API (FastAPI, Celery, Redis). Use for routes, tasks, config, WebSocket, schemas, Celery workers.

pipeline.description: Risalah pipeline (audio, transkripsi, diarization, AI enhancement, DOCX). Use for audio_processor, transcriber, diarizer, ai_enhancer, docx_generator, file_scanner, utils, pipeline modules.

ui-dev.description: Streamlit UI development. Use for ui/app.py, layout, components, user experience.

devops.description: Docker, Docker Compose, deployment scripts, CI/CD. Use for Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, scripts/, .env configuration.

9router.description: Fast agent using local 9router LLM (Llama 4 Maverick via Groq). Use for quick tasks, brainstorming, lightweight queries.

run-pipeline.description: Run the risalah pipeline on an audio file or folder
run-pipeline.template: Jalankan pipeline risalah: source .venv/bin/activate && python risalah/pipeline.py $ARGUMENTS

run-api.description: Start the FastAPI backend server locally
run-api.template: Jalankan server FastAPI: source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn api.app:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

run-ui.template: Jalankan Streamlit UI: source .venv/bin/activate && streamlit run ui/app.py --server.port 8501 --server.address 0.0.0.0

docker-up.description: Start all services with Docker Compose
docker-up.template: Jalankan Docker Compose: docker compose up --build -d

docker-down.template: Hentikan semua service: docker compose down

setup.description: Install dependencies and setup the project

test.description: Run all tests or specific test file
